summary: A clip from a NewsNation segment. A reporter stands in front of a border fence with a lower-third reading CPB FIGHTING NORTHERN BORDER DRUG THREAT and a DEL RIO, TEXAS label. The segment shows a map graphic headed DETROIT SECTOR LEADS NORTHERN DRUG SEIZURES highlighting Michigan and the Great Lakes near the Canadian border, and a quote graphic headed DETROIT SECTOR FACES UNIQUE SMUGGLING CHALLENGES with a statement attributed to a Border Patrol official.

script.scene: A reporter stands in front of a border fence; lower-third reads CPB FIGHTING NORTHERN BORDER DRUG THREAT; label reads DEL RIO, TEXAS.
A map graphic headed DETROIT SECTOR LEADS NORTHERN DRUG SEIZURES highlights Michigan and the Great Lakes near Canada.
A quote graphic headed DETROIT SECTOR FACES UNIQUE SMUGGLING CHALLENGES shows a statement attributed to a Border Patrol official.
